visual_analysis: The layout is organized, clearly separating interactive elements, instructional text, and visual representations of data. The use of color is appealing, enhancing engagement without overwhelming the user, and typography is clear and legible.
educational_analysis: The educational concept of binary max-heaps is clearly articulated through extensive instructional elements and well-structured visuals. The interactive components, like inserting values and extracting max, align effectively with the learning objectives, enabling hands-on exploration of the concept.
